title: centella dentata
intro: Centella dentata, also known as Indian pennywort, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centella dentata include improving cognitive function, enhancing memory, and supporting skin health, as well as possessing potential therapeutic effects for conditions such as fever and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Centella dentata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine.
